title: Add pharmaceutical company partner logos section

requirements.summary: Add 'Our Pharmaceutical Partners' section displaying logo tiles for six pharmaceutical companies using either real logo images or styled fallback tiles
acceptanceCriteria: A clearly labelled 'Our Pharmaceutical Partners' (or similar) section appears on the page
All six companies are represented: Aqualab, Smartway, Laborate, Cipla, Smartlab, Smart Iconic
Each entry shows either a real logo image or a clean branded fallback tile with the company name
The section uses the existing blue and green color scheme and fits visually with the rest of the page
The section is responsive and displays well on both mobile and desktop

file_operations.description: Add a 'Our Pharmaceutical Partners' section after the services section and before the about section. Create a responsive grid layout displaying six pharmaceutical partner entries (Aqualab, Smartway, Laborate, Cipla, Smartlab, Smart Iconic). For each partner, attempt to load a logo image from a reliable public URL; if unavailable or for fallback styling, render a styled tile using the company name with the site's existing medical-themed blue and green color scheme. Ensure the section header matches the existing section styling (Stethoscope icon, gradient text). Use Tailwind classes to ensure responsive behavior across mobile and desktop viewports.
